name: Federation Valley
notes: Most popular off-leash zone, between Carrington Drive and Grand Drive (northern Centennial Park). 24/7 off-leash, unfenced.

name: Sandstone Ridge
notes: Popular off-leash zone adjacent to Federation Valley. 24/7 off-leash, unfenced.

name: Grand Drive Outer Zones (Centennial Park)
notes: Off-leash areas outside the Grand Drive circuit. 24/7 off-leash, unfenced. Keep dogs 10m from ponds and playgrounds.

name: Parkes Drive West (Centennial Park)
notes: Off-leash zone west of Parkes Drive. 24/7 off-leash.

name: Dickens Drive Green (Centennial Park)
notes: Off-leash area near Dickens Drive. 24/7 off-leash.

name: Learners Cycleway Surrounds (Centennial Park)
notes: Off-leash outside 10m of the Learners Cycleway itself. 24/7 off-leash.

name: Kippax Lake Surrounds (Moore Park)
notes: Off-leash area near Kippax Lake, Moore Park. Keep 10m from water.

name: Moore Park Golf Adjacent
notes: Off-leash area near Moore Park Golf Club boundary.

name: Queens Park Open Lawns
notes: Designated off-leash areas within Queens Park, managed by Centennial Parklands.

name: Dogsville (Centennial Park)
notes: Unofficial popular gathering spot near Federation Valley, well-known among local dog community.
